examples: I came on purpose to find you, Jane Eyre.
Don't be afraid of me, Miss Eyre.
As I was looking at him, he suddenly turned, and asked me: "Do you think I'm handsome, Miss Eyre?"
Also included are odd, piquant works from the Smithsonian Institution, by Eyre de Lanux.
The academy's director, Professor Deborah Eyre, said students were being offered "an outstanding, often life-changing, opportunity".
